en.alert_green: Ideal planting window. Apply nitrogen fertilizer today.
en.alert_yellow: Sandbag low-lying areas. Move poultry indoors in 24hrs.
en.alert_red: Relocate cattle to Zone B immediately. Water reserves will deplete.

sw.alert_green: Wakati mzuri wa kupanda. Weka mbolea ya naitrojeni leo.
sw.alert_yellow: Weka mifuko ya mchanga maeneo ya chini. Hamishia kuku ndani ya masaa 24.
sw.alert_red: Hamishia ng'ombe eneo B mara moja. Akiba ya maji itaisha.

am.alert_green: ተስማሚ የመትከያ ወቅት ነው። ዛሬ የናይትሮጅን ማዳበሪያ ይጨምሩ።
am.alert_yellow: ዝቅተኛ ቦታዎችን በአሸዋ ከረጢት ይሸፍኑ። የዶሮ እርባታን በ24 ሰዓት ውስጥ ወደ ውስጥ ያንቀሳቅሱ።
am.alert_red: ከብቶችን ወደ ዞን ቢ ወዲያውኑ ያንቀሳቅሱ። የውሃ ክምችት ያልቃል።

so.alert_green: Waa xilli wax ku beeraan wanaagsan. Maanta geli bacrinta nitrogen-ka.
so.alert_yellow: Aagagga hooseeya sanduuqyo ciid ah ku daboo. Digaagga 24 saacadood gudahood gudaha u wareeji.
so.alert_red: Xoolaha u wareeji Aagga B isla markiiba. Kaydka biyuhu wuu dhamaan doonaa.
